title: H4 calibration infrastructure patch (NEW — spawned by B0030 archive)
source: B0030 v2 spec §Task 4 pre-commit; empirical audit failure at [signals/audit_results/20260527-XAU-H4-BULLQ-MEANREV-RETEST.json](signals/audit_results/20260527-XAU-H4-BULLQ-MEANREV-RETEST.json).
why: Without this patch, ANY H4 primary producing <~500 BULL_QUIET events post-regime-gate hits the same B0030 failure. B0031 (GDELT) at same event density would fail identically regardless of sub-daily ingest. The H4 work-stream as designed in B0000 v3 is structurally non-evaluable for selective primaries until this ships.
value_rationale: H (gates the entire H4 work-stream's evaluability; without this, B0031 + future H4 candidates cannot be audited)
scope: (a) Raise H4 path `calib_holdout_pct` to 0.40 (mirrors existing D1+phase5_* override at `phase5/run_proposal.py:170`). May not be sufficient if the root cause is the default `cv=5` inside `CalibratedClassifierCV`, not just slice size.
(b) Configure `CalibratedClassifierCV` with `cv=2` or adaptive `cv=min(5, n_samples//2)`. Defeats the prefit-equivalent intent of FrozenEstimator but is sklearn-API-correct.
(c) Use `cv='prefit'` semantics (deprecated in sklearn 1.4+ but may still work).
(d) Add a pre-flight inner-calibration-slice-size projection to fire_rate_check (so future H4 proposals fail at pre-flight rather than runtime).

history.reason: H4 calibration infrastructure patch — slot-1 of B0000 v3 work-stream. Picked over B0040 because (i) it unblocks the active research direction wholesale, (ii) B0031 already queued behind it, (iii) 4 concrete candidate fixes vs B0040 design-question.

Root cause: sklearn CalibratedClassifierCV(FrozenEstimator(...)) calls cross_val_predict(cv=5) internally; H4 selective primaries land on calibration slices where StratifiedKFold(5) is infeasible. Fix: (1) cap cv adaptively in pipeline/train.py:RefittingCalibratedPipeline.fit to max(2,min(5,n_minority_calib)); (2) add early project-side guard requiring n_minority_calib>=2 (replaces cryptic sklearn ValueError with actionable message); (3) raise H4 calib_holdout_pct to 0.40 in phase5/run_proposal.py H4 branch, mirroring D1 phase5_* override. Scope items: (a)+(b) addressed; (c) cv=prefit deprecated, not needed; (d) pre-flight projection deferred — runtime path now robust + actionable. Regression tests: tests/test_refitting_calibrated_pipeline.py adds test_b0032_small_minority_calibration_slice_succeeds_at_n_minority_2 + test_b0032_n_minority_1_raises_clear_error. 528/528 tests pass.
feat(phase5): close 7 tickets â€” Loop A/H4 infra hardening + reporting
fix(B0003): keep benchmark-only SP500 out of feature-critical FRED_SERIES
chore(backlog): record commit-sync provenance for B0003/B0032
